channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SPL] Swashthik Plascon Ltd Confirms Compliance with SEBI Regulations Amidst Stock Price Fluctuations
item.description:
Swashthik Plascon Ltd, in response to an email dated 08th April, 2026, has confirmed its compliance with Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company will continue to inform the Stock Exchange about any material information as required under the said Regulations. The price movement of the company's shares on the Stock Exchange is market-driven and not influenced by the company's management. The fluctuations are attributed to general market conditions.

  • Swashthik Plascon Ltd confirms SEBI Regulation 30 compliance
  • Company to continue informing Stock Exchange about material information
  • Stock price fluctuations are market-driven
  • Company's management not involved in price movement
  • Price fluctuations attributed to general market conditions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swashthik Plascon Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AFIL] Akme Fintrade: Star Housing Finance Seeks Reclassification from Promoter to Public Category
item.description:
Star Housing Finance Limited, a shareholder in Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd, has requested reclassification from the 'Promoter / Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category under Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Star Housing Finance does not hold any shares in the Company and has never had control over its affairs. The request will be considered by the Board of Directors and is subject to approval from the Stock Exchange. The reclassification is intended to align with the actual status of Star Housing Finance's relationship with the Company.

  • Star Housing Finance has requested reclassification from 'Promoter / Promoter Group' to 'Public' category.
  • The request is in accordance with Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Star Housing Finance does not hold any shares in Akme Fintrade and has never had control over its affairs.
  • The reclassification is subject to approval from the Board of Directors and the Stock Exchange.
  • The move aims to align with the actual status of Star Housing Finance's relationship with Akme Fintrade.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd | Category: Reclassification

item.title: [CASTROLIND] Castrol India Elevates Flagship Products in Two- and Four-Wheeler Segments to Full Synthetic, Disrupting Market
item.description:
Castrol India Limited, a leading lubricant manufacturer, announced two new full synthetic additions to its two- and four-wheeler engine oil range. The Castrol Activ range now includes full synthetic 10W-30 and 5W-30 viscosities, while Castrol GTX has been upgraded to full synthetic for 5W-30 and 0W-20 viscosities. This transition sets a new benchmark for the Indian lubricants market and brings full synthetic technology to mass segments. The new range of Castrol Activ delivers 20% improved protection across the engine, clutch, and gearbox, ensuring a smoother ride for everyday commuters. The new GTX full-synthetic range is designed to deliver a cleaner engine and better deposit control, while giving customers more value for their money. The entire range will be available across Castrol India's extensive distribution network nationwide and on the company’s online stores on Amazon and Flipkart.

  • Castrol India introduces Castrol Activ Full Synthetic 10W-30 and 5W-30 for two-wheelers, expanding its offering for modern motorcycles.
  • Castrol GTX 5W-30 has been upgraded to Castrol GTX Full Synthetic 5W-30, and Castrol GTX Full Synthetic 0W-20 is introduced for the personal-car segment.
  • New full synthetic range designed to deliver a cleaner engine and better deposit control, while giving customers more value for their money.
  • Castrol India's extensive distribution network of over 150,000 retail outlets nationwide and online stores on Amazon and Flipkart will carry the entire range.
  • New launches coincide with the silver jubilee year of Castrol Activ, marking an important milestone for one of the company’s flagship brands.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CASTROL INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TAJGVK] Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd. Complies with SEBI Regulations for Share Transfer Audit
item.description:
Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd. has complied with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, for the year ended 31.03.2026. The company, in accordance with Regulation 40(9), has delivered all registered transfers and rejections within 30 days from the date of lodgment for the period ending on 31.03.2025. The compliance certificate was issued by a Practicing Company Secretary and was examined by OS Vidya Rani & Associates, the company's Registrars & Share Transfer Agents. No cases of physical transfer of shares were reported during the period.

  • Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd. has complied with SEBI regulations for the year ended 31.03.2026
  • The company has delivered all registered transfers and rejections within 30 days from the date of lodgment
  • No cases of physical transfer of shares were reported during the period
  • The compliance certificate was issued by a Practicing Company Secretary
  • OS Vidya Rani & Associates examined the share transfer deeds and registers

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TAJGVK HOTELS & RESORTS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [TATAPOWER] Tata Power Collaborates with Databricks to Build Future-Ready Data and AI Platform
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Power, one of India’s largest integrated power companies, has announced the enterprise-wide adoption of the Databricks platform. This move aims to accelerate Tata Power’s data and AI transformation across all business clusters, enhancing operational efficiency, smarter decision-making, and scalable digital innovation. The unified data and AI platform will support intelligent grid management, advanced power planning, improved billing and collection efficiencies, accurate renewable forecasting, and operational excellence.

  • Tata Power adopts Databricks platform for enterprise-wide data and AI transformation.
  • The new platform aims to enhance operational efficiency, smarter decision-making, and scalable digital innovation.
  • The unified platform will support intelligent grid management, advanced power planning, improved billing and collection efficiencies, accurate renewable forecasting, and operational excellence.
  • Tata Power's decision to standardize on Databricks reflects the growing importance of data and AI in transforming the energy sector.
  • The new platform will enable self-service analytics, ‘talk-to-data’ capabilities, and the democratisation of data and AI in the medium term.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA POWER CO.LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [VLEGOV] VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd: No Undisclosed Information Behind Price Movement
item.description:
In response to a clarification request, VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd confirmed that there is no undisclosed information or material event that could affect the price and/or volume behavior of the company's securities. The company has complied with all applicable provisions of the SEBI Listing Regulations and believes the recent price movement is market-driven.

  • VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd denies knowledge of any undisclosed information affecting security price and volume behavior.
  • The company has complied with all applicable provisions of the SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • The recent price movement in the company's securities is believed to be market-driven.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RATEGAIN] RateGain’s UNO Platform Powers Direct GDS Connectivity for Hotelogix Worldwide
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RateGain Travel Technologies Limited has announced a strategic partnership with Hotelogix, a leading cloud-based Property Management System. The collaboration enables Hotelogix customers worldwide to access direct GDS connectivity through RateGain’s UNO Platform, unlocking corporate travel demand without the complexity of managing separate integrations. This integration allows hotels to activate GDS distribution, reach over 600000+ travel agents and corporate travel programs, and manage connectivity alongside their day-to-day operations from a single, unified platform.

  • RateGain’s UNO Platform Powers Direct GDS Connectivity for Hotelogix Worldwide
  • Hotelogix customers worldwide can now access direct GDS connectivity through RateGain’s UNO Platform
  • Hotels using Hotelogix PMS gain seamless access to Amadeus, Sabre Corporation, and Travelport GDS networks
  • This integration allows hotels to manage connectivity and operations from a single, unified platform
  • The partnership reflects a broader industry shift towards unified distribution ecosystems

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [CHEMBONDCH] Chembond Chemicals Ltd: No Pending Price-Sensitive Information, Price Movement Market Driven
item.description:
Chembond Chemicals Ltd has confirmed that there is no pending price-sensitive information that could have led to the significant movement in the price of its shares. The company's price movement is purely market driven. Chembond Chemicals Ltd is in compliance with the SEBI regulations and has been promptly disclosing all material information/events.

  • Chembond Chemicals Ltd confirms no pending price-sensitive information
  • Price movement of Chembond Chemicals Ltd shares is market driven
  • Chembond Chemicals Ltd complies with SEBI regulations
  • Chembond Chemicals Ltd promptly discloses all material information/events

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chembond Chemicals Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HBLPOWER] HBL Engineering Ltd Secures Rs.83.81 Crores Order from Patiala Loco Works
item.description:
HBL Engineering Ltd has accepted an order worth Rs.83.81 Crores (Inclusive of 18% GST) from Patiala Loco Works (PLW), Punjab for Supply, testing and commissioning of On-board KAVACH equipment (Ver.4.0). The contract is to be completed on or before April 15, 2027. This order does not fall under the Related Party Transaction category as none of the promoters are interested in the transaction.

  • HBL Engineering Ltd has secured an order worth Rs.83.81 Crores from Patiala Loco Works (PLW), Punjab.
  • The order is for the Supply, testing and commissioning of On-board KAVACH equipment (Ver.4.0).
  • The contract is to be completed on or before April 15, 2027.
  • This order does not fall under the Related Party Transaction category.
  • None of the promoters are interested in this transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HBL POWER SYSTEMS LTD.-$ | Category: Deals

item.title: [ALOKTEXT] Alok Industries Ltd to Approve Q4 and FY26 Financial Results on April 16, 2026
item.description:
Alok Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 16, 2026, to consider and approve the Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This is in accordance with Regulation 29 and other applicable provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Alok Industries Ltd to approve Q4 and FY26 financial results on April 16, 2026
  • The meeting is in accordance with Regulation 29 and other applicable provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALOK INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
